contact_institute: CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology
data_processing: Background subtracted expression values for probes (Sample Probe Profile) were exported from illumina Gene expression version 1.9.0 and Supervised Normalization of Microarrays (snm) was used to generate normalized expression values for the samples.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from all the lymph node tissue samples using the manual TRIzol (Invitrogen) method in BSL3 facility. The quantity and quality of the isolated RNA was determined using Nanodrop-1000 (Thermo Fischer Scientific) and Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies, CA, USA), respectively. RNA with RIN (RNA integrity number) value >7 was considered for further assessment as it reflects ideal value of integrated RNAs. These RNA samples had both 260/280 nm absorbance and 28S/18S rRNAs peak ratio greater than two. To obtain sufficient quantities of RNA for microarray, two-rounds of linear amplification of RNA were conducted using illumina TotalPrepTM RNA Amplification Kit (Applied Biosystems by Life Technologies, CA, USA)
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and washing steps were performed as per manufacturers instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated, purified antisense RNA was quantitated and 750ng of labeled cRNA was hybridized onto Illumina HumanHT-12 v4 Expression BeadChip arrays containing more than 47,000 probes representing more than 31,000 annotated genes.
scan_protocol: The arrays were scanned by illumina iScan System.

The quantity and quality of the isolated RNA was determined using Nanodrop-1000 (Thermo Fischer Scientific) and Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies, CA, USA), respectively. RNA with RIN (RNA integrity number) value >7 was considered for further assessment as it reflects ideal value of integrated RNAs. These RNA samples had both 260/280 nm absorbance and 28S/18S rRNAs peak ratio greater than two. To obtain sufficient quantities of RNA for microarray, two-rounds of linear amplification of RNA were conducted using illumina TotalPrepTM RNA Amplification Kit (Applied Biosystems by Life Technologies, CA, USA)
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and washing steps were performed as per manufacturers instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated, purified antisense RNA was quantitated and 750ng of labeled cRNA was hybridized onto Illumina HumanHT-12 v4 Expression BeadChip arrays containing more than 47,000 probes representing more than 31,000 annotated genes.
scan_protocol: The arrays were scanned by illumina iScan System.
